successCriteria.description: src/modules/notification/notification.model.ts exists and exports Notification, CreateNotificationDto, and UpdateNotificationDto interfaces with exact field definitions from canonical architecture
src/modules/notification/notification.repository.ts exists and exports INotificationRepository interface and NotificationRepository class implementing all four methods
NotificationRepository methods use PostgreSQL pool for database operations (GP-001 compliance)
All notification types match the canonical SQL schema: 'leave_request', 'leave_approval', 'leave_rejection', 'balance_update', 'policy_change'
Repository follows repository pattern with proper constructor injection of Pool dependency

constraints: GP-001: Repository pattern - All database access goes through repository interfaces
GP-002: Input validation - Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
GP-005: Error handling - No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Architecture: Modular monolith with dependency direction leave -> notification
Architecture: Use TypeScript, Node.js 20, Fastify, PostgreSQL
Architecture: Notification types must be exactly: 'leave_request', 'leave_approval', 'leave_rejection', 'balance_update', 'policy_change'
Architecture: Notification fields must be exactly: id, recipientId, senderId, type, title, message, metadata, isRead, readAt, createdAt
Architecture: CreateNotificationDto fields must be exactly: recipientId, senderId, type, title, message, metadata
Architecture: UpdateNotificationDto fields must be exactly: isRead, readAt
